svg.text: Coloring Image: Antoinette Brown Blackwell: America's First Woman Minister: A simple, line-drawn portrait showing Antoinette Brown Blackwell in her minister clothes with a book in hand standing next to her sister Henrietta. Both are wearing 1800s-style long dresses with simple hairstyles. They are smiling and standing in front of a small church building. Simple, educational, child-friendly, outline drawing for coloring
